scenes.title: Your focus is under attack.
scenes.subtitle: Kavana — AI Deep-Work Companion
scenes.voiceover: Every ping steals a piece of your day.
scenes.visualDescription: Clean navy gradient background with slow-drifting particles. Bold title scales in from center. Subtitle fades up after 30 frames.

scenes.title: 47 interruptions. Before lunch.
scenes.subtitle: Fragmented attention costs hours
scenes.voiceover: Forty-seven interruptions before lunch. Your calendar looks like shattered glass.
scenes.visualDescription: Notification cards cascade from screen edges — Slack, Gmail, Calendar, Teams — each with red urgency dot. Focus meter drains 100% to 12%, turning crimson. Calendar blocks shatter into fragments on the right.
scenes.audioCue: tension building, subtle synth pad enters

scenes.title: Kavana
scenes.subtitle: AI Deep-Work Companion
scenes.voiceover: Meet Kavana. Your AI deep-work companion.
scenes.visualDescription: Noise freezes mid-air. Luminous shield icon expands from center with concentric violet-cyan rings. Notification particles dissolve downward. Focus meter reverses climbing 12% to 94%.

scenes.title: Shield. Orchestrate. Clarify.
scenes.subtitle: Three pillars of deep work
scenes.voiceover: Shield your focus. Orchestrate your day. One priority at a time.
scenes.visualDescription: Three feature panels slide in sequentially: (1) bell icon with slash — Focus Shield, (2) calendar blocks snap into rows — Smart Orchestration, (3) single glowing priority card — Clarity Dashboard.

scenes.title: +176% deep work time
scenes.subtitle: Less noise. More done.
scenes.voiceover: Users report nearly triple the deep-work hours. Less noise. More done.
scenes.visualDescription: Split-screen: left shows 2.1 hrs deep work in red with declining arrow; right shows 5.8 hrs in green with rising arrow. Animated counter ticks up to +176%.

scenes.title: Start your focused day.
scenes.subtitle: kavana.ai
scenes.voiceover: Start your focused day. Kavana — one intention, a whole day.
scenes.visualDescription: Kavana logo centers — stylized shield with K lettermark. English tagline fades in, then Hebrew tagline below in RTL. Soft particle background. Logo pulse animation.
scenes.audioCue: warm piano resolve, gentle fade out
